narrative:
Cols 69-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 2,459 registered voters, with 70.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.3%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.4 percentage points.
